headline: 'SPACs Attack' Recap: Looking Back At 5 SPAC Deals, Rumors And Top Headlines
summary: The week kicked off with a large SPAC deal announced on Sunday, bringing a new global sports betting and online casino company public. Several other SPAC deals were announced throughout the week along with a couple rumors that could be worth a watch this week.

headline: Elon Musk Asks For 'SNL' Sketch Ideas On Twitter, Including 'Woke' James Bond And 'Irony Man'
summary: Elon Musk has gone to Twitter seeking sketch ideas for his upcoming appearance on "Saturday Night Live."

headline: Jury Finds Former Netflix VP Guilty Of Taking Kickbacks In Contract Deals
summary: A former executive at Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) faces up to 20 years in prison after a jury in San Jose, California, found him guilty of fraud.

headline: Vodafone And Google To Jointly Develop Cloud Data Services
summary: Vodafone and Google plan to develop a system called "Dynamo" that will be able to extract and transport data across different countries.

headline: 9 Takeaways From Berkshire Hathaway's Annual Shareholder Meeting
summary: Warren Buffett on May 1 addressed Berkshire Hathaway Inc's (NYSE: BRK-A)(NYSE: BRK-B) shareholders at the annual general meeting, which was held in Los Angeles virtually due to the COVID-19 pandemic. </

headline: Start Of Production At Tesla's Berlin Plant Delayed Till Early 2022: Report
summary: The planned start of production at Tesla Inc's (NASDAQ: TSLA) Berlin factory reportedly has been delayed until at least January of next year.

headline: Could Elon Musk's 'SNL' Hosting Cause A Bump In Tesla Or Dogecoin?
summary: An appearance by the executive of a publicly-traded company on CNBC or another business-related news channel can sometimes move the share price fast. If the show airs outside the trading hours, it can sometimes have less of an effect on the share price.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Curaleaf, Bank of America, Crocs, Sherwin-Williams And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story examines the prospects for the U.S. cannabis industry.
	Other featured articles discuss how cryptocurrency threatens the role of central banks, why steel stocks are due for a fall and whether the tech giants will thrive.

headline: 'Fast Money' Picks For May 3: Draftkings, Alphabet, PayPal, Paysafe
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trades," Tim Seymour said Draftkings Inc (NASDAQ: DKNG) is not cheap, but he likes it.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, GE, Microsoft, Tesla, Twitter And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included the iPhone maker, top airlines and a leading coffee purveyor.

headline: Cathie Wood Can't Get Enough Of These 3 Chinese Alibaba Rivals
summary: Cathie Wood-led Ark Investment Management has recently been heavily buying into three Chinese stocks that are rival to Alibaba Group Holding (NYSE: BABA) in the e-commerce and online groceries space.
